item.title: More freshly stolen trans memes to kick off pride month.
item.description:
For those who may not know, Nintendo has rereleased Thousand Year Door and rewritten Vivi's dialogue to confirm she is Trans.
Lets add a couple more sins this month
This one it important to remember, I see plenty of Trans TERF's out there and it's sad.
Ok I feel I need to clarify here based on a couple comments, this isn't about hating men, and the same user who made this version also posted the opposite version at the same time. I am trans femme so I grabbed this version since it represents ME. I do not like my masuline form and it makes me Dysphoric The prospect of eventually being able to fully embrace my feminine side brings me Joy and hope. That is what this meme is about.
:3
It's been a month already... I know I know it's not a race it's a marathon but still feels like this
*snrk*
Gibbe pls.
I still get that feeling sometimes.
This one may not be for everyone, personally that is the only part im NOT dysphoric about -_-
I like to include stuff for the trans boi's too normally but the troves were a bit dry of them today and I really need an ice cream right now.
Also includes free headpats.
This concludes this round of meme pilfering. Raids will continue until head pats and snacks are aquired.
Noir Tax, He's a dapper little gentleman.
item.dc:creator: daakuryu

item.dc:creator: meejaCookieTerror

item.title: From homeless to freedom in 9 days!
item.description:
I was dating the wrong person for a long time. It became toxic and I lost my joys; plants all died, I stopped cooking, I knew I wasn’t being the Mom my kids deserved. So! I blew it all up……….
Finally left. Got some help from my kids Dad (we have a great friendship, mutual respect and mutual best interests for the kids) and within 9 days, I found an awesome apartment in a community with a pool and gym, da wyeks. Never lived on my own before and cannot wait to make this MY Home.
I’ve lined up two job interviews, made a reading nook (complete with twinkle lights and a curtain, of course) out of the recessed tv area and I cannot wait for my kids to see the new home that Mommy made for us by Herself. To anyone in a toxic situation; you can do it. Get support, reach out, find your strength and leave. You are strong enough to shift your reality and once you do, it is absolutely liberating. Love this community. Deleted all social media but this because I need my fail/motivational dumps. Just proud of myself and wanted to share. ❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️
Also, I crochet as a hobby and now Mama needs to make some money. Check out my Etsy you filthy animals; https://bagsbycissy.etsy.com EDIT- Front Page?!?! FroNt FrIgGiNg PaGE?!?! You guys crashed my already insufficient Etsy and I couldn’t be happier!!! I will absolutely be beefing that up and thank you thank you thank you to anyone that wants to buy a lovie, stay tuned! I was told I should put up a CashApp name, $CeciliaEvans333 for anyone who might want to donate to a struggling single Mom. Can’t tell yall how much the interest and support has meant to me. You guys are the best. Thank you ❤️ https://imgur.com/gallery/YzdKdGP The reading nook!
item.dc:creator: Momster33

item.dc:creator: countervail247365

item.title: Exercising and changing my diet
item.description: Medication change forced me to quit drinking soda (because it makes it taste bad), which was the ultimate excuse for me to finally start losing weight. I actually ended up cutting a lot of sugar from my diet and am portioning my meals a lot better than I used to. Soda just made me crave more. Goal weight is 210 lbs. Wish me luck! Edit: Wow! Thanks everyone for the support! Edit 2: Decided to answer a couple questions as well. I?m 6?1? tall. I drank about 5-6 cans of soda a day. What I?m doing along with cutting the soda is also cutting other sugar foods and junk foods from my diet (not eliminating them entirely, but also not slamming a pack of Oreos in 2 days). I?ve strictly been drinking water. Any drink that?s had any added sugar (besides coffee) has not tasted right to me so I?ve avoided it. Also joined a gym and exercising about 4 days a week. Gym environment motivates me and helps with my ADHD. Gets me out of the house. (originally posted by @sgtmajorcool on 2023-06-03 02:55:02)
item.dc:creator: ThisTimeLastYear

item.title: Are ye Scottish enough ya wee lass?
item.dc:creator: WeirdAlisMySpiritUserName

item.title: Maybe they just need some hair implants.
item.description: Still an amusing surprise, anyway. I didn't think anyone in my neck of the woods would bother with such an unreliable automobile, especially given our winters. Folks in awe were approaching it to take pictures, blocking my exit in the process. Damn thing wasn't even moving and it still made my driving experience worse... 1/10. Wouldn't park near again.
item.dc:creator: MrSwissroll

item.title: US 17th Airborne Paratroopers, with their hair cut in Mohawk-style, being briefed for the next day’s Jump across the Rhine, Arras, France. Photograph taken on the 23 March 1945.
item.dc:creator: Joyika

item.title: Just when you think you get a big break...
item.description: Client comes in out of the blue, asking me if I could make them some assets for their little game. Kid looked really ambitious, listing everything that they want, and then, I do the math, and I share what I had so far, then the words you don't want to hear come... "I'm sorry, but I don't think I can afford that" I knew it was gonna be too good to be true, but I made that itemized list anyways, could have been my finest work yet, and it was all squandered. I tried to tell em that they should lower their expectations, but I got shot back with: "Can't you just give me a discount?" Buddy, buddy, I'm one of the cheaper artists out here, I'm already doing an excessive amount of work, I need adequate compensation. I'm now dreading some idiot shouting online that I'm overpricing my work... Anyways, rant over, fire me a downvote here or on the dedicated comment, and continue on, usersub. Edit: due to popular request in the comments, here are my portfolios https://jamestdg.newgrounds.com/ (the high quality stuff) https://toyhou.se/17879645.art-examples (everything else)
item.dc:creator: JamesTDG

item.title: When you're sad, watch this for 0.06 seconds
item.description: I find it better than Zoloft (yes 8 yrs experience). Just trying to help you smile or crack a mental smirk even if only a brief moment. Cheers!!
